title: Flame's Additions
description: Adds some new expensive items allowing you to make a miniature universe!
body:
This mod adds some miscellaneous features
It adds a new type of enderman with a slight yellow texture difference. it spawns only in the end and has a chance to drop the item "Star Shard"
with 2 star shards and a netherite ingot, you can make a miniature star

![2-star shards and a netherite ingot in a smithing table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7af4251d4424d11d7c9ede096e4dca27d25fc7f8.png)

you can also make miniature planets

![a planet being crafted](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94023e3c6cb28506026c1bb3e4547e9cc53218eb.png)
 ![planet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ef0e19bc678bf12c76dcabd165b668d9b467d35.png)
 ![miniature planet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47e22276cc31ac56294257de9d9a1887893da30e.png)

 There are also miniature moons
 
 ![moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8680e679406c8fa06c658d4626f0c2632d4079d.png)

 with those, you can make a solar system!

 ![4 + 2 + 1 + 1 + 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c44a29fdaeca661d87dfe57c36722b611b31f4ea.png)

 Black holes are also here!

 ![black hole](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40615364969eb3819d769a76117ec67ba932f818.png)

 with those things, you can make a whole galaxy!

 ![galaxy craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c1a35e13bed6d513d8ae1b6fd81bb5b286f69d8.png)

 *Currently, these items don't have any other use than to display your wealth*
